extraction.one_line_summary: SKELMOSE Mattias attacked solo on the final lap with 32 seconds gap, holding off four chasers who were tactically paralyzed after 4h10m of chaotic racing
tactical_patterns: SKELMOSE Mattias exploited teammate SCREECH Tom's repeated counterattacks to mask his own winning move on final lap
HARPER Chris and HAMILTON Lucas cancelled each other with two Jayco riders in five-man selection, enabling Lotto Trek numerical advantage
Race fractured definitively after 40km mirroring 2022 pattern, suggesting early Breakaway commitment critical for Maryland profile

rider_signals.SKJELMOSE Mattias: positive: survived multiple dropped moments in selection then had residual power for solo final lap attack
rider_signals.SCREECH Tom: positive: sacrificed own result with repeated attacks to set up SKELMOSE, elite domestique execution
rider_signals.HAMILTON Lucas: neutral: made five-rider selection but tactically neutralized by HARPER presence, lacked finishing speed for third
rider_signals.HOULE Hugo: neutral: made podium from selection but never countered SKELMOSE move, conservative racing for third
